data.body: TASK #1 DONE: jira-reb-695 removed. REB-695 DELETE in Jira -> HTTP 204 (verified 404). Local jira-reb-695 -> 'rebar delete --user-approved' -> status=deleted (tombstoned, off all lists); commit 15def2eef on origin/tickets. ROOT CAUSE (why not cleaned up by its creator): REB-695 was a HAND-CREATED Jira throwaway ('delete me') never deleted in Jira; the automated bridge-probe is RULED OUT (its try/finally delete works). The reconciler inbound bootstrap (_apply_inbound_create) faithfully mirrors every open Jira issue -> no experiment/test exclusion in fetcher JQL / inbound_differ / apply_inbound -> it slurped the leftover. Not a rebar code defect; optional hardening = import-exclusion for a no-sync/experiment label. NOTE: bridge-fsck 'dangling' for REB-768/769/770 is a FALSE POSITIVE from my local stale prev_snapshot (all three exist 'To Do' in Jira) -> no bug. 695 'would_terminal' binding self-retires on reconciler next-404. TASK #2 DONE: filed canary bug (nitpicking-unbecoming-wisent 0dc5, P1) + flaky-format bug (subsequent-glandular-albino 9b3a, P2); luxe-adder-faith linked discovered_from canary bug.
